mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_registry(gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolDescription}, #{httpUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{httpHeaders}, #{timeout}, #{retryTimes}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_protocol_registry SET tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_type = #{toolType}, tool_description = #{toolDescription}, http_url = #{httpUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, http_headers = #{httpHeaders}, timeout = #{timeout}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_registry WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_registry ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_registry WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
